pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly defines coordinates for NASA DSN Goldstone Complex. Coordinates and altitude match real-world geodetic data and the verifier scripts.
Task instruction explicitly defines coordinates for NASA DSN Madrid Complex. Coordinates and altitude match real-world geodetic data and the verifier scripts.
Task instruction explicitly defines coordinates for NASA DSN Canberra Complex. Coordinates and altitude match real-world geodetic data and the verifier scripts.

Task instruction explicitly requests tracking ISS (25544), CSS (48274), NOAA 19 (33591), and AO-7 (7530). These NORAD catalogs match Celestrak databases and the internal GPredict environment configurations.
Task instruction explicitly requests UTC time. Verifier accurately checks for gpredict.cfg modifications such as utc=1 or use_local_time=0.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures GPredict with three ground stations matching the real-world NASA Deep Space Network (DSN) complexes. The required coordinates for Goldstone (35.4267, -116.8900, 1031m), Madrid (40.4314, -3.9527, 830m), and Canberra (-35.4014, 148.9817, 680m) strictly match the prompt descriptions and the expected mathematical tolerances in the verifier. The requested satellite tracking modules for ISS (25544), CSS TIANHE (48274), NOAA 19 (33591), and AO-7 (7530) correspond to actual NORAD objects verified via the agent's internal TLE cache and the base GPredict installation database.
